title: 桜花賞の後に・樫の楯へと

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Gah! And I was so close, too! I knew she wouldn't
go easy on me.
choice_data_list: G1s are tough nuts to crack.
G1s are tough nuts to crack.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again. Still, complaining won't
get me anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The next Tiara will be mine. I'm not going to give
up, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But the me right now won't cut it. Not to mention, she's also getting stronger.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just so we're clear, I'm not scared of her or
anything. I'm only speaking the truth.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm a long way from being number one. I have to
get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sitting here sulking isn't going to do me any
good. The Japanese Oaks is just around the
corner.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I won't let anyone take the title of Queen of the
Oaks away from me! That number one spot is
mine!
